name: HRY_INTERFACE_RUNS
description: Data to be stored for jobs run with a specific job type.

columns.Name: INTERFACE_RUN_ID
columns.Comments: The column indicates a unique sequence generated value.

columns.Name: RUN_ID
columns.Comments: The column indicates the job id value of hex_jobs table.

columns.Name: JOB_TYPE
columns.Comments: The column indicates the type of job being triggered.

columns.Name: JOB_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: The column indicates the id value for type of job being triggered.

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: The column indicates the process status of the job.

columns.Name: PROCESS_TYPE
columns.Comments: The column indicates the type of process being triggered for a particular job type.

columns.Name: EXPIRY_ID
columns.Comments: The column indicates the eligibility of the record for purge.

columns.Name: DATA_EXPIRY_ID
columns.Comments: The column indicates the eligibility of the record for purge for hry_interface_data table.
